analysis: The project is a static website focused on black holes with an existing dark, cosmic theme. The current files include HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for the main website, as well as documentation and GitHub pages. The CSS file needs to be completed with full dark, cosmic theme elements, including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The JavaScript file requires updates for interactive features like mobile menu toggles and event handlers. The HTML file needs to be completed with all sections related to black holes, including interactive planets and animated slides.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.
Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes.
Update the JavaScript file to include interactive features like mobile menu toggles, event handlers for buttons, and functionality for animated slides and objects.
Fix the SVG data URL in --black-hole-pattern-5 to include proper SVG content and ensure it is correctly formatted.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.
